targets.query:
base = from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.simulated, set: ${simulated:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.location, set: ${location:json}))

base
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "door")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "open")

base = from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.simulated, set: ${simulated:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.location, set: ${location:json}))

base
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "motion")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "detected")

base = from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.simulated, set: ${simulated:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.location, set: ${location:json}))

base
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")

base = from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.simulated, set: ${simulated:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.location, set: ${location:json}))

base
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidity")
